game_info.title: lower-walls-and-summits
game_info.concept:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight platformer from the creators of TowerFall. Brave hundreds of hand-crafted challenges, uncover devious secrets, and piece together the mystery of the mountain. Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall.



  • A narrative-driven, single-player adventure like mom used to make, with a charming cast of characters and a touching story of self-discovery
  • A massive mountain teeming with 700+ screens of hardcore platforming challenges and devious secrets
  • Brutal B-side chapters to unlock, built for only the bravest mountaineers
  • IGF “Excellence in Audio” finalist, with over 2 hours of original music led by dazzling live piano and catchy synth beats
  • Pie
The controls are simple and accessible - simply jump, air-dash, and climb - but with layers of expressive depth to master, where every death is a lesson. Lightning-fast respawns keep you climbing as you uncover the mysteries of the mountain and brave its many perils.

This is it, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do this.
game_info.description: Help Madeline climb Celeste Mountain and reach the summit while overcoming challenging platforming obstacles. Jump across gaps, dash through the air, and climb walls to navigate hand-crafted levels. Avoid deadly spikes and falling into pits. Each screen presents new challenges that test your precision and timing. Collect strawberries for bonus points as you ascend the mountain!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb up/down on walls
Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump)
Z: Air dash in the direction you're moving (limited uses, recharges on landing)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement, jumping, and navigation through the first level. Validates that the player can move, jump, and reach the goal platform to complete a level.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right using arrow keys, jump over gaps and obstacles, and reach the goal flag at the end of the level. Use simple platforming skills without advanced mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate to the goal flag, trigger level completion, and advance to the next screen. Test passes when player reaches at least level 3 without dying.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully navigate to the goal flag, trigger level completion, and advance to the next screen. Test passes when player reaches at least level 3 without dying.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal strategy to complete all levels and win the game. Uses advanced mechanics including wall climbing, dashing, and double jumping to navigate challenging sections efficiently.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Utilize all movement abilities strategically - wall climb to reach higher platforms, dash through gaps, double jump for extra height. Avoid all hazards while collecting strawberries when safe. Navigate through all screens to reach the summit.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Complete all levels, reach the mountain summit, trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when the win condition is achieved within a reasonable time frame.

TEST_2.expected: Complete all levels, reach the mountain summit, trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when the win condition is achieved within a reasonable time frame.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests hazard interaction and death mechanics. Validates that touching spikes or falling into pits properly triggers respawn at the current level's starting position.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally move into spikes and fall into pits to test death and respawn mechanics. Verify that lives decrease and player respawns correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player dies upon contact with hazards, respawns at level start with one less life. When lives reach zero, GAME_OVER_LOSE is triggered. Test validates proper game over handling.
TEST_3.description: Tests hazard interaction and death mechanics. Validates that touching spikes or falling into pits properly triggers respawn at the current level's starting position.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests dash mechanic recharge system and wall climbing physics. Validates that dashes recharge on landing and wall sliding works properly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Repeatedly dash in the air and verify it depletes. Land on platforms to recharge dash. Climb walls by holding against them and pressing up/down.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Dash depletes when used in air and recharges upon landing. Wall climbing allows vertical movement. Test succeeds when mechanics work consistently across multiple uses.
TEST_4.description: Tests dash mechanic recharge system and wall climbing physics. Validates that dashes recharge on landing and wall sliding works properly.

TEST_4.expected: Dash depletes when used in air and recharges upon landing. Wall climbing allows vertical movement. Test succeeds when mechanics work consistently across multiple uses.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests strawberry collection system. Validates that collecting strawberries increases score and they disappear from the level.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Navigate levels specifically targeting strawberry positions. Collect multiple strawberries across different levels and verify score increases.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Score increases by correct amount for each strawberry collected. Strawberries are removed from the level after collection. Test validates collectible system integrity.
